CustomField.description: This field is used for the actual MR calculation. By default, it copies the Assembly Derate value unless overridden. If overridden, the Effective Derate captures the overridden value and uses it for the MR calculation.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is used for the actual MR calculation. By default, it copies the Assembly Derate value unless overridden. If overridden, the Effective Derate captures the overridden value and uses it for the MR calculation.
CustomField.label: Effective Derate
